surfaces.why_not_touching: Retained repair authority entrypoint; deterministic Batch 7 coverage now pins its flags-only CLI, supported task formats, artifact paths, and routing metadata contract.
input_outputs: outputs: repaired.csv, repair history, escalation records, repair_checkpoint.json
test_gaps: Resume remains intentionally unsupported and must stay documented as snapshot-only unless implemented in a later batch
Changes to artifact naming or CLI flags must update docs and contract tests together
unfreeze_conditions: Deterministic repair contract tests stay green
Repair runbooks remain aligned with the flags-only CLI authority

surfaces.why_not_touching: Batch 8 physically removed this script from scripts/ and archived it under _obsolete/repair_archive after the retained repair authority was confirmed to be repair_loop.py.
input_outputs: outputs: repaired rows, escalation records, stats
test_gaps: Archived utility remains unmaintained unless a future batch explicitly restores it
Any restore attempt must re-evaluate retained repair authority ownership
unfreeze_conditions: A future batch explicitly promotes it back into scripts with new contract tests
Restore decision record supersedes Batch 8 archive closeout

surfaces.why_not_touching: Retained validation baseline entrypoint; deterministic fixture coverage now pins its row-count contract, artifact paths, scoring report schema, and CSV output shape.
input_outputs: inputs: validation CSV, model selection, pricing and credential inputs
outputs: translation CSV, metrics JSON, deterministic score report
test_gaps: Any score formula or artifact-path change must update docs and deterministic contract tests together
Runtime adapter/network behavior still depends on dedicated adapter coverage outside the validation fixture slice
unfreeze_conditions: Deterministic validation contract tests stay green
Repro runbook remains aligned with the default input/output contract

surfaces.why_not_touching: Retained validation dataset generator; deterministic sampling and metadata schema are now part of the baseline contract for validation reproducibility.
input_outputs: inputs: source draft CSV, row count, seed
outputs: validation sample CSV, sampling metadata
test_gaps: Sampling bucket heuristics should only change with fixture updates
Metadata contract must stay in sync with repro documentation
unfreeze_conditions: Deterministic sampling and metadata tests stay green
Validation runner keeps consuming the documented dataset contract
